What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with long dark hair wearing a red top sews grey fabric with scalloped edges using a needle. A needle pierces through the layers of the material while thread creates stitches along the edge. Hands cut a length of purple thread using scissors with black handles on a white surface. Angela Wolf speaks to the camera in front of a wooden ladder shelf containing glass jars.

question: How many hands are visible folding the light blue-grey fabric?

Describe the sequence of sewing and threading actions shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a machine needle pierces grey fabric with black thread; at 6s, a hand pulls a needle upward through scalloped edges; at 14s, a person holds a thread spool and needle apart; at 16s, thread stretches horizontally between the hands as it is pulled.
